titleStmt.title: SII 27.94: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 94. (A.R. No. 317 of 1931-32.) KUTTŪRU, (hamlet of Hegguñje) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing in the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This slightly damaged record registers a gift of land to god Mahādēva of a locality (name not clear) in Hegguñji by Dēvappaguḍḍa, son of Chauḍaguḍḍa when Haridēva-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya.
It is dated Śaka 1345 (current), Śubhakṛit, Chaitra ba. [8, Tuesday] corresponding to 1422 A.D., April 14.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāma
ra cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī ja
yābhyudaya śakavarṣa 1345 ne varttamāna śubhakrutu saṁvatsarada cayatra ba
8 malu śrīrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarā
yaragaṁḍa pūrva dakṣiṇa Uttara samudrādhipati śrīvīra pratāpa rāmacaṁdra mahārāya
Oḍeyaru sakalasāṁbrājyaṁ geyavakāladalli Ā rāyara nirūpadiṁda haridēva vo
ḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalli hegguṁjiya cauḍaguḍḍa
na maga dēvappaguḍḍanu hegguṁjiya ḷe kalla śrīmahādēvarige madhyāhnada Upā
rakke ya rāpina Upārakke yippāne Akkiya nayivēdyake māḍida brahmadāyada
Agadeya catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu hāya baḷiyi
ṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu maḍiya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu ha
laneya beṭṭiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu kanakara baḷiyara sīmeyiṁda teṁkalu yaṁ
tī catusīmeya Oḷaguḷa Eraḍu muḍimu 2 hāne 20 tteṁkabayala catussīmeya
vivara muḍalu heggaḍe baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu bāyiriya gaḍiyi
ṁda teṁkalu paḍuva baḷiya kōṭisara heggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁda muḍalu baḍagalu Ā ga
ḍiṁda teṁkayiṁtī catusīmeyoḷage Uḷa Uḍibittuva mu 3 hāne 20 ya
bāḷa bāḷagadeya catusīmeya vivara muḍalu ji baḷiyavara gaḍiyi
ṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu toḷahara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu kaṟuka na gaḍiyiṁ
gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yi nāku catu sīmeyoḷage
muḍe gadeyanu sēnabōvana maga bopa sēna bō
sēnabōva yavarabāḷige da mūlavāgi
ya bāḷaṁ ṭṭida Akkimūḍe
yippāne Akkiya nayivēdya Ātana
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
